title: Comforts and Compasses Advancements Pack Add-on
description: An add-on to the BlazeandCaves Advancements Pack to add support for the Comforts mod, the Nature's compass mod, and the Explorer's compass mod.
body:
Have you ever wanted to use the comforts mod with the BlazeandCaves Advancements Pack?
How about the nature's compass mod?
Or the explorer's compass mod?
Did you also want to add next to impossible challenges that take away the fun?
And are you okay with all of these at the same time!

Then you should use this datapack!
What do you mean this is a niche?

Note: this datapack is only tested on datapack format 15!
